title: Left Finger Moon Vocal Range Comparison Chart
brief: A technical comparison chart showing vocal range comparison between different singers and songs. Horizontal piano keyboard layout with colored bars representing vocal ranges: normal human (green, narrow bar), average pop singer (blue, medium bar),萨顶顶 in 左手指月 (red/gold, very wide bar spanning almost 3 octaves), and标注出 E3, B5, C6等关键音高标记. Also show comparison bars for other famous songs like 青藏高原, 煎熬, 阿刁. Dark background with glowing colored bars. Title: 'FIGURE 3: 音域覆盖对比图 (Vocal Range Coverage Analysis)'. Tech infographic style with piano key pattern at bottom. Clean, scientific look with Chinese and English labels.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Left Finger Moon Vocal Range Comparison Chart'. Diagram type: WeChat article cover. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-2k. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A technical comparison chart showing vocal range comparison between different singers and songs. Horizontal piano keyboard layout with colored bars representing vocal ranges: normal human (green, narrow bar), average pop singer (blue, medium bar),萨顶顶 in 左手指月 (red/gold, very wide bar spanning almost 3 octaves), and标注出 E3, B5, C6等关键音高标记. Also show comparison bars for other famous songs like 青藏高原, 煎熬, 阿刁. Dark background with glowing colored bars. Title: 'FIGURE 3: 音域覆盖对比图 (Vocal Range Coverage Analysis)'. Tech infographic style with piano key pattern at bottom. Clean, scientific look with Chinese and English labels.
